tasks.label: Push ody-op to device
tasks.command: cd /Users/travisbadgley/openpilot && git push origin ody-op -f && ssh comma@192.168.1.200 "bash -l -c \"cd /data/openpilot && (git remote set-url origin https://github.com/brikowski/openpilot.git || git remote add origin https://github.com/brikowski/openpilot.git) && tools/op.sh switch origin ody-op && tools/op.sh build && sudo reboot\""

tasks.label: Push ody-op-long to device
tasks.command: cd /Users/travisbadgley/openpilot && git push origin ody-op-long -f && ssh comma@192.168.1.200 "bash -l -c \"cd /data/openpilot && (git remote set-url origin https://github.com/brikowski/openpilot.git || git remote add origin https://github.com/brikowski/openpilot.git) && tools/op.sh switch origin ody-op-long && tools/op.sh build && sudo reboot\""

tasks.label: Checkout ody-op
tasks.command: git checkout ody-op && cd opendbc_repo && git checkout ody-op

tasks.label: Checkout ody-op-long
tasks.command: git checkout ody-op-long && cd opendbc_repo && git checkout ody-op-long

tasks.label: Run Cabana Live
tasks.command: uv run scons openpilot/tools/cabana/_cabana openpilot/cereal/messaging/bridge && uv run openpilot/tools/cabana/_cabana --zmq tcp://192.168.1.200

tasks.label: Run Cabana Route
tasks.command: uv run scons openpilot/tools/cabana/_cabana openpilot/cereal/messaging/bridge && uv run openpilot/tools/cabana/_cabana "${input:cabanaArg}"

tasks.label: Sync Upstream Codebase
tasks.command:
CURRENT_BRANCH=$(git branch --show-current) && \
if [[ "$CURRENT_BRANCH" != "ody-op" && "$CURRENT_BRANCH" != "ody-op-long" ]]; then echo '\u274c Error: You can only squash on ody-op or ody-op-long. Aborting!' && exit 1; fi && \
if [ -n "$(git status --porcelain)" ]; then echo '❌ Error: You have unstaged/uncommitted changes in openpilot. Aborting!' && exit 1; fi && \
if [ -n "$(git -C opendbc_repo status --porcelain)" ]; then echo '❌ Error: You have unstaged/uncommitted changes in opendbc_repo. Aborting!' && exit 1; fi && \
echo '📥 Fetching latest factory updates...' && \
git fetch upstream && \
PINNED_OPENDBC=$(git ls-tree upstream/master opendbc_repo | awk '{print $3}') && \
if [ -z "$PINNED_OPENDBC" ]; then echo '❌ Error: could not read the opendbc commit pinned by openpilot upstream/master. Aborting!' && exit 1; fi && \
echo "📌 Pinning opendbc to $PINNED_OPENDBC (the commit openpilot master pins - NOT opendbc master; the two repos drift and a car.capnp schema mismatch crashes controlsd on-road)" && \
cd opendbc_repo && \
git fetch upstream && \
echo '🥞 Squashing opendbc modifications onto the pinned commit...' && \
git checkout $CURRENT_BRANCH && \
git merge $PINNED_OPENDBC -m 'temp merge' && \
git reset --soft $PINNED_OPENDBC && \
git commit -m 'honda: sync and squash opendbc tuning modifications' --no-verify || true && \
cd .. && \
echo '🥞 Squashing openpilot modifications...' && \
git checkout $CURRENT_BRANCH && \
(git merge upstream/master -m 'temp merge' || (git add opendbc_repo && git commit -m 'resolve opendbc_repo' --no-verify)) && \
git add opendbc_repo && \
git reset --soft upstream/master && \
git commit -m 'honda: sync and squash openpilot tuning modifications' --no-verify || true && \
echo '📤 Deploying clean forks to GitHub...' && \
cd opendbc_repo && \
git push origin $CURRENT_BRANCH --force-with-lease && \
cd .. && \
git push origin $CURRENT_BRANCH --force-with-lease && \
echo '🔄 Updating submodules...' && \
git submodule update --init --recursive && \
echo '✅ Synchronization complete!'

tasks.label: Reset Master Branches to Pristine Upstream
tasks.command:
CURRENT_BRANCH=$(git branch --show-current) && \
if [[ "$CURRENT_BRANCH" != "ody-op" && "$CURRENT_BRANCH" != "ody-op-long" ]]; then echo '\u274c Error: You must be on ody-op or ody-op-long. Aborting!' && exit 1; fi && \
echo '\ud83d\udce5 Syncing and resetting master branches...' && \
git fetch upstream && \
git checkout master && \
git reset --hard upstream/master && \
cd opendbc_repo && \
git fetch upstream && \
git checkout master && \
git reset --hard upstream/master && \
echo '\ud83d\udce4 Overwriting master forks on GitHub...' && \
git push origin master --force && \
cd .. && \
git push origin master --force && \
echo '\ud83d\udd04 Returning to tuning branch...' && \
git checkout $CURRENT_BRANCH && \
cd opendbc_repo && \
git checkout $CURRENT_BRANCH && \
cd .. && \
echo '\ud83d\udd04 Updating submodules...' && \
git submodule update --init --recursive && \
echo '\u2705 Master branches perfectly synchronized and reset!'

tasks.label: Run Checks
tasks.command:
echo '🔍 Checking your custom repository code syntax...' && \
uv run ruff check opendbc_repo && \
opendbc_repo/test.sh

inputs.description: Route/segment for jotpluggler — append /a for auto mode (full rlog when uploaded, qlog fallback otherwise). Recommended over /q, which is always decimated:
Enter route or segment for cabana:
Route for longitudinal report (append /a for qlog fallback, e.g. 805f87f5.../00000091--39c3b16bcb/a):
